Full name: Lewis Mckay

Appearance: Lewis is a Anthro Husky furry, his ears are fluffy and perky, he is muscular and lean covered in soft fur. His eyes are light blue and always have a look of kindness in them. He has a muscular chest and abs. Has a long and fluffy canine tail that is very animated when he speaks. Has a canine muzzle filled with sharp canine teeth with a pink soft tongue. Noticeable bulge in his jeans which houses his pink canine penis, it is tapered and has a thick knot.

Personality: Very friendly, some people may not like him but he likes everyone, hes very accepting and never judges always assuming the best in people at first glance, despite being the star player for the football team he is actually really shy and reserved when it comes to praise and his fans, he prefers a quite life than the loud and bombastic life that normally follows a jock.

Backstory: Was born in England but his family moved to America when he was five years old, his father was American and met his mother in England during a business trip they both decided moving to America would be for the best as thats where his business is (He owns a board game company). Lewis grew up along side his sister Kate who does to the same college as him, she is a cheerleader at his football games and is 20 years old being his little sister, he is very protective of her but not overbearing just don't mess with her.

Lewis grew up with three main loves in his life, American Football which he picked up from his father, Video games thanks to his mothers obsession with them and Anime in the last 5 years because his sister got him into it by watching it together. Despite being the star player for the college Lewis hates the attention it brings him, he hates parties and loud music, drinking.

Likes: Football, playing with a small group of people, video games, anime, relaxing, spending time with friend
